concept: Create a turn-based game where I command a party of adventurers exploring a dungeon that physically reconfigures itself whenever I complete a turn. Corridors seal off and new ones open, rooms change size and function, and previously defeated enemies might reappear in different configurations. My party members each perceive the dungeon differently, providing conflicting information that I must interpret to determine the actual layout. The narrative gradually reveals that the dungeon is a living entity testing potential successors to become its new master.
